# tests/digital-marketing/integration/test_integration.py

## Purpose

Recommended: pytest + real PostgreSQL + real Redis.
Per global §64.30 tier 2: cross-service flows touch real DB + cache.

### Functions
- `test_digital_marketing_db_roundtrip()`: REPLACE — verify digital-marketing table CRUD round-trips against real Postgres.
